title: covellia hispida
intro: Covellia hispida, also known as the hairy covellia, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Covellia hispida include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating various ailments such as skin infections and wounds. Covellia hispida can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is sometimes used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
